calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 10:38AM
Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig, Clerk-Param Natt, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant-Otto Rivas appeared in Pro Per. Court Certified Spanish Interpreter Nina Safdie, interpreted for Appellant-Otto Rivas. Respondent-Apoyo Financiero, Inc. was represented by their President and Ceo--Rick Parras. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Fleisig.
Appellant withdraws Appeal in open court.
